title: Copilot Agent returning error for pulling information

posts.author: tm_monday (Tiffany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Does anyone know if Copilot Agent is unable to return information if there are more than two filters applied in a question? For example, if I ask it

  • Search for all items marked ‘proposal creation’ and has an origination date in November 2025 across my board, then create a summary report of their current cost of work (£).

it will return an Error code: SystemError. However, if I only asked it to search for one criteria, either only all items marked proposal or only origination date of Nov, it is able to return an answer.

The agent itself said that it can return information based off of multiple criteria but nothing I tried has worked, I’ve tried with different columns and boards as well.
